title: Towel Service Has Been Restored

content:
We’re happy to announce that we have resumed towel service at the Edmonton Squash Club effective July 30th.

We are still working out the kinks in our new inventory management procedures, so please be patient if there are a few hiccups. We ask that members restrict their towel usage to one sweat towel and one bath towel per visit.

If you have any questions, feel free to email or talk to the front desk or leave a comment below.
